results.title: FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS AND KEY METRICS - Citi
results.snippet: Citigroup reported net income of $5.8 billion, or $3.06 per diluted share, on revenues of $24.6 billion for Q1 2026, a 14% increase from the prior year driven by growth across all five businesses. CEO Jane Fraser noted strong performance in Services, Markets, Banking, Wealth, and U.S. Consumer with $6.3 billion in share repurchases.

results.title: Citigroup Inc (C) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights
results.snippet: Citigroup Inc reported net income of $5.8 billion, EPS of $3.06, and RoTCE of 13.1% with total revenues of $24.6 billion up 14% year-over-year. Highlights include 17% Services revenue growth, Markets revenue over $7 billion, 12% increase in banking fees, and $6.3 billion in share buybacks.

results.title: Citigroup Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
results.snippet: Citigroup reported net income of $5.8 billion, EPS of $3.06, RoTCE of 13.1%, and revenues of $24.6 billion for the first quarter of 2026. The earnings call transcript details positive operating leverage and momentum across its business segments.

results.title: Earnings Results Presentation First Quarter 2026 - Citi
results.snippet: This official presentation covers Citigroup's preliminary Q1 2026 earnings results with detailed financial metrics, segment performance, and key highlights across all business lines. All information is based on results released in mid-April 2026.

results.title: CITIGROUP ($C) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings
results.snippet: Citigroup posted Q1 2026 earnings on April 14, reporting $3.06 per share on significantly higher revenues and net income compared to the prior year. The release highlights strong capital returns including substantial share repurchases.

results.title: Citi Logs Best Returns in Five Years as Revamp Takes Hold
results.snippet: Citigroup achieved its highest quarterly revenue in a decade as traders rode volatility, marking success for CEO Jane Fraser's turnaround plan and the bank's best returns in five years.

results.title: Citigroup Smashes Q1 2026 Estimates: A Deep Dive into the Fraser Turnaround
results.snippet: Citigroup reported Q1 2026 earnings with a 13.1% Return on Tangible Common Equity, beating its 11% target and achieving highest quarterly revenue in over a decade under CEO Jane Fraser's restructuring.

results.title: Citi profit beats estimates as market volatility lifts trading revenue
results.snippet: Citigroup's profit jumped 42% on market volatility boosting trading revenue, with CEO Jane Fraser stating the bank has completed 90% of consent order work as part of its ongoing turnaround and restructuring.

results.title: Citi is betting its costly hiring spree will pay off
results.snippet: Citigroup expects recent dealmaker hires to deliver returns soon as CEO Jane Fraser pushes the firm beyond its yearslong revamp, with the bank continuing headcount reductions in 2026.

results.title: Citigroup Surges as Fraser's Overhaul Yields 42% Profit Growth
results.snippet: Citigroup shares surged after 42% profit growth from CEO Jane Fraser's multi-year overhaul that simplified the bank's structure into five core businesses.

results.title: Citigroup (C) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions ...
results.snippet: 16 analysts have given Citigroup (C) a consensus rating of Buy while the Citigroup (C) price prediction in 2026 is $134.81. Wall Street analysts have set a price target of $127.88 reflecting a 0.00% increase from the current stock price.

results.title: Is Citi Stock Set to Soar in 2026?
results.snippet: Shares in Citigroup saw outsized gains so far in 2025. This bull run could carry on into the new year, especially as CEO Jane Fraser continues the bank's long-term turnaround efforts and 2026 earnings growth expectations.

results.title: Citigroup Stock's 2026 Outlook After a 40% Gain Last Year
results.snippet: Citigroup Stock’s 2026 Outlook After a 40% Gain Last Year. Citi’s valuation implies a 7% annualized return through 2028 with an upside projection that could reach $141 implying 23% total upside.

results.snippet: The overall analyst rating is Strong Buy (8.7/10). Based on analysis of 31 Wall Street analysts, Citigroup Inc. (C) has a median price target of $140.00 for 2026.
